description_long: This object is a thick, irregularly shaped steak with a rough, jagged edge on one side and a flatter, smoother surface on the top. The top surface is marked with a series of engraved or burned symbols, including Roman numerals and other linear markings, giving it an ancient or ritualistic appearance. The coloration is predominantly a cooked brown with some darker charred spots and lighter beige areas, suggesting a well-done exterior. The sides display a porous, fibrous texture, mimicking the look of cooked meat fibers and a seared crust. There is no visible bone, garnish, or plating, and the steak appears solid and dense. The overall form is somewhat wedge-shaped, with a thick, uneven profile and a substantial, rustic presence.
description: A thick, wedge-shaped steak with rough, jagged edges, engraved markings on top, and a well-done, charred brown surface.
description_view_0: From this angle, the steak's jagged, porous edge and the engraved symbols on the top surface are clearly visible, highlighting its thickness and rustic texture.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the rounded, smoother side of the steak and shows more of the engraved markings, with the porous edge receding into the background.
description_view_2: Seen from the narrow end, the steak's flat top and the linear arrangement of symbols are prominent, while the thickness and layered texture are less pronounced.
description_view_3: This side displays the most rugged, deeply textured edge, with the engraved symbols and charred surface visible along the top, emphasizing the steak's irregular shape.
attribute_grill_marks: Grill marks are absent; instead, there are engraved or burned symbols and numerals on the surface.
